observation.summary: Store channel claims are observed through a package/distribution contract.

hypothesis.summary: A distribution change can accidentally add forbidden artifacts, terms, or user-path leakage.

execution.summary: Run the store contract verifier against the repository.

evaluation.summary: The verifier fails on missing docs, notice terms, forbidden package roots, or user-path artifacts.

retrospective.summary: Store review and channel decisions are promoted into C11 SSOT instead of loose notes.
